articles.description: Asia stocks rise with Japan, S. Korea at record highs; tech gains ahead of Nvidia
articles.content:
Investing.com-- Most Asian stocks advanced on Wednesday with Japanese and South Korean shares rallying to record highs on strength in technology stocks.

articles.title: Oura launches a proprietary AI model focused on women’s health - TechCrunch
articles.description: The model supports questions spanning the full reproductive health spectrum, from early menstrual cycles through menopause.
articles.content: Oura announced on Tuesday that it’s launching its first proprietary AI model to enable its AI chatbot, Oura Advisor, to deliver personalized insights around women’s health. The company says the model… [+2334 chars]
